title: Mandalorian Armor
description: Replaces all common Armour and Armor Trim with Mandalor armour.
body:
![Mandalorian Armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4ee9059a968893bf2a4f688a09f40e86bdb4204a.png)
### Replaces all common Armour and Armor Trim with Mandalor armour.

**Armor Trim:**
- Sentry Armor Trim
- Dune Armor Trim
- Coast Armor Trim
- Wild Armor Trim
- Tide Armor Trim
- Ward Armor Trim
- Vex Armor Trim
- Rib Armor Trim
- Snout Armor Trim
- Eye Armor Trim
- Spire Armor Trim
- Wayfinder Armor Trim
- Raiser Armor Trim
- Shaper Armor Trim
- Host Armor Trim
- Silence Armor Trim
- Flow Armor Trim
- Bolt Armor Trim

**Armor:**
- Leather Armor
- Copper Armor
- Iron Armor
- Golden Armor
- Diamond Armor
- Netherite Armor
- Chainmail Armor
- Turtle Shell
